ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Coach of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "team_value" TEXT /* Current market value of the team */,
  "home_stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home stadium of the team */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the team owner */,
  "captain" TEXT /* Name of the team captain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of surface (e.g., grass, turf) */,
  "venue_type" TEXT /* Type of venue (e.g., stadium, arena) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team_id_home" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "team_id_away" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the match was played */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., league, playoff) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the match */,
  "live_stream_url" TEXT /* URL of the live stream */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_id_home FOREIGN KEY ("team_id_home") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_id_away FOREIGN KEY ("team_id_away") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for performance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the performance is recorded */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored in the season */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoff_probabilities" (
  "probability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the playoff probability entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the probability is calculated */,
  "chance_of_playoffs" TEXT /* Chance of making playoffs in decimal form */,
  "chance_of_championship" TEXT /* Chance of winning the championship in decimal form */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("probability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_probabilities_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, coach) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Permission level (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "resource_accessed" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user (e.g., team stats, match data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_statistics" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played */,
  "total_goals" INTEGER /* Total number of goals scored across all matches */,
  "average_attendance" TEXT /* Average attendance per match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_venue_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the venue stats record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Matches played at this venue */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Wins at this venue */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Losses at this venue */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Draws at this venue */,
  "home_wins" INTEGER /* Home wins */,
  "home_losses" INTEGER /* Home losses */,
  "home_draws" INTEGER /* Home draws */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_venue_stats_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_venue_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "match_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for match statistics */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "possession_home" INTEGER /* Possession percentage by home team */,
  "possession_away" INTEGER /* Possession percentage by away team */,
  "fouls_home" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by home team */,
  "fouls_away" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by away team */,
  "shots_home" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by home team */,
  "shots_away" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by away team */,
  "corners_home" INTEGER /* Number of corners taken by home team */,
  "corners_away" INTEGER /* Number of corners taken by away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the player stats record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Matches played by the player */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Red cards received by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "expected_recovery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of recovery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
